title: Rush gas
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rush gas''' was a type of [[Poison/Legends|poison]] gas used by [[Gopso'o]] tribesmen in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] when they attacked the [[Drovian]]s in [[Bagsho]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
